summary: All 9 verification checks passed: package structure complete, zero /close injection paths, zero runEphemeralTurn references, complete() imported and called, type-check passes, sendUserMessage uses followUp, phase whitelist terminal case correct, completeSimple fallback resolves, br lint clean. No failed checks.

passedChecks.command: test -f index.ts && grep -q 'export default function' index.ts
passedChecks.expected: index.ts exists with a default export function (factory function)
passedChecks.result: PASS — index.ts exists, 'export default function ultramode(pi: ExtensionAPI)' found

passedChecks.command: test -f prompts/decision-prompt.md && test -f prompts/selection-prompt.md && test -f README.md && test -f AGENTS.md
passedChecks.expected: All scaffold files exist: decision-prompt.md, selection-prompt.md, README.md, AGENTS.md
Zero matches of /close in index.ts — the loop stops at /pr, never injects the merge-phase command
passedChecks.result: PASS — zero /close matches found in index.ts

passedChecks.expected: Zero matches of runEphemeralTurn — the method is not accessible to extensions; complete() from @oh-my-pi/pi-ai is used instead
passedChecks.result: PASS — zero runEphemeralTurn matches found in index.ts

passedChecks.command: grep -q 'import { complete' index.ts && grep -q 'await complete(' index.ts
passedChecks.expected: complete() is imported from @oh-my-pi/pi-ai and called in the decide() helper
passedChecks.result: PASS — 'import { complete, completeSimple } from "@oh-my-pi/pi-ai"' on line 8; 'await complete(model, context, { apiKey })' in decide() function

passedChecks.expected: Type-check passes — bun build exits 0 with no errors
passedChecks.result: PASS — exit code 0, no type errors

passedChecks.expected: All sendUserMessage calls use deliverAs: followUp (avoids re-entrancy deadlock); PHASE_WHITELIST has pr: null terminal case
passedChecks.result: PASS — deliverAs: followUp found on all sendUserMessage calls; PHASE_WHITELIST has 'pr: null' (terminal — human merges)

passedChecks.expected: completeSimple fallback function is importable from @oh-my-pi/pi-ai (for providers requiring ApiKeyResolver instead of static string)
passedChecks.result: PASS — completeSimple is a function, importable from @oh-my-pi/pi-ai

passedChecks.expected: No lint issues on the bead

uncheckedRisks: Risk 1 (complete() API key resolution fails for some providers) — partially verified: completeSimple import confirmed but not exercised with a real provider that requires ApiKeyResolver. The fallback code path exists (try/catch in decide()) but has not been triggered against a real provider.

Risk 2 (sendUserMessage re-entrancy deadlock) — not verified: the deliverAs: followUp pattern is implemented but has not been tested under a live turn_end handler in a real OMP session. The autoresearch extension uses similar patterns without deadlock, suggesting the runtime handles this.

Risk 3 (ctx.model is undefined) — not verified: the error-handling path exists (decide() throws, turn_end handler catches and sets mode=idle) but has not been triggered in a session without a configured model.

Risk 4 (br scheduler returns zero recommendations) — not verified: the fallback to br list --status open --status in_progress --json is implemented but has not been tested against an empty scheduler in a live session.

Risk 5 (LLM returns invalid JSON) — not verified: the parseDecision() helper with regex extraction and fail-safe to stop is implemented but has not been tested against real LLM output in a live session.

artifacts.purpose: Extension entry point — factory function with state management, decide() helper using complete(), runSelection(), turn_end/turn_start/tool_call event handlers, /ultramode command handler
Work-selection prompt template with {bv_triage_json} and {br_scheduler_json} placeholders; instructs LLM to return JSON with action/beadId/reasoning schema
Phase-decision prompt template with {bead_id}/{phase}/{retries}/{last_output}/{artifact_status} placeholders; instructs LLM to return JSON with action/reasoning/nextCommand schema
OMP plugin manifest — omp.extensions[0] == ./index.ts, no npm dependencies (resolved by OMP runtime)
Install + usage documentation for the ultramode extension
Open-spec AGENTS.md — README for agents with setup, architecture, code style, testing, PR instructions, guardrails
OMP-internal canonical project context — workflow, br/bv conventions, memory protocol, skills map, extension architecture section
Project vision — Ultramode goal, 5 verifiable success criteria, current phase
Naming, extension structure, key API surface (complete() not runEphemeralTurn), git, workflow, agent conventions
TypeScript/Bun runtime, br 0.2.15/bv 0.17.0, verification commands, constraints (no runEphemeralTurn, no /close injection)
10 ADRs covering complete() over runEphemeralTurn, sendUserMessage with followUp, stop at /pr, appendEntry persistence, retry cap, etc.
7 active warnings: runEphemeralTurn inaccessibility, ctx.session absence, sendUserMessage re-entrancy, empty scheduler, undefined model, workflow-gate density, complete() API key type mismatch

followUps: End-to-end test: install ultramode in a real OMP session with a configured model, run /ultramode on, verify the LLM decision loop fires and a phase command is injected via sendUserMessage
State persistence test: run /ultramode on, kill OMP, restart, verify /ultramode status shows mode=on reconstructed from session journal
Retry cap test: simulate a failing bead phase, verify after 3 retries the bead is marked blocked via br update --status blocked and the loop picks the next bead
completeSimple fallback test: trigger the fallback path with a provider that requires ApiKeyResolver instead of a static apiKey string
